name: hangar_netting
summary: Import hangar contents and net them against requirements at every tier, propagating leftover intermediates down the tree.
description: Lets the user paste/enter their hangar contents so the calculator subtracts what's already owned from what's needed at every tier of the build plan, not just the final product - e.g. if 10 Robotics are needed but 4 are already in the hangar, only the Reactive Metals/Consumer Electronics for the remaining 6 are requested. Also handles reusing partially-built intermediates from earlier steps (e.g. use 5 Acolyte I already built plus 5 more crafted in this run). Done when the worked example from the interview (partial Robotics in hangar reduces Reactive Metals needed) works end to end.
